attacking_style: Capable of sustained breakaway efforts with strong time trial ability on gradual finishing climbs. Shows willingness to commit to long-range moves in Grand Tours.
team_tactics: Limited evidence of specific team setup; demonstrated ability to function independently in breakaways without heavy domestique support.
terrain_preference: Gradual finishing climbs that favor time trial power over pure climbing. Suited to long breakaways where TT strength can be leveraged in final kilometers.
vulnerability: Inexperienced in sprint finishes after breakaways; lost to bike throw despite being strongest rider, suggesting tactical naivety in close finishes.
key_patterns: Strong solo time trial ability in breakaway scenarios, particularly on gradual climbs.
Lacks experience in technical finish execution despite having physical strength to win.
form_trajectory: positive: showed Grand Tour breakthrough potential with near-stage win, demonstrating climbing and TT capabilities
